hero.title: Crafting digital experiences with code & creativity

about.title: About Me
about.body1: I design and build products end-to-end - from pixel-perfect interfaces to robust APIs. I care deeply about craft, motion, and user experience. Currently focused on Next.js, TanStack, and modern animation systems.
